nodes.name: SQ_76
nodes.sql: SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, CASE ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND WHEN 'LN_ZY' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_SDL' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_OTH' THEN '垫款' WHEN 'ICF_BLN' THEN '买方信贷' WHEN 'ICF_FL' THEN '保理' END AS CUST_LOAN_KIND, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, jj.due_bill_code, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, (CASE WHEN jj.GRANT_DATE >= '20240101' THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND S.BZNS_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND S.REVER_TYPE IS NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND s.BZNS_DATE < '20240101' AND s.REVER_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND s.REVER_STAT = '2' AND s.REVER_TYPE = '2'), 0) + COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0), jj.LOAN_AMT) END) / 10000 AS jjqcye, 0 AS ffje, jj.GRANT_DATE, jj.intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, zq.ext_rate, 0 AS hkje, '' AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN jj.FACT_END_DATE WHEN NOT zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END AS dqrq, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) / 10000 AS yzflx, jj.recv_actno AS grant_settle_actno, jj.due_bill_id, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_CONT_BASE ht INNER JOIN lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_DUE_BILL jj ON ht.CONT_ID = jj.CONT_ID INNER JOIN lc00059999.CUST_CORP_INFO cc ON cc.CUST_CODE = ht.CUST_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON ht.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.BILL_STAT IN ('2', '4', '5') AND ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND <> 'LN_WD'

nodes.name: lc00059999.LSWBZD
nodes.sql: SELECT * FROM lc00059999.LSWBZD

nodes.name: t1
nodes.sql: SELECT tt.EJDW, tt.CUST_CODE, tt.CUST_NAME, tt.CONT_CODE, tt.EXT_CONT_NO, tt.CUST_LOAN_SUBTYPE, TO_CHAR(ROUND(tt.TOTAMT / 10000, 2), '999999999990.99') AS totamt, tt.CURCD, tt.DUE_BILL_CODE, TT.DUE_BILL_ID, tt.JJJE, tt.FFJE, CAST(tt.GRANT_DATE AS DATE) AS GRANT_DATE, tt.INTRATE, tt.ZQJE, CAST(tt.OLD_CONT_END_DATE AS DATE) AS OLD_CONT_END_DATE, tt.EXT_RATE, tt.HKJE, CAST(tt.HKRQ AS DATE) AS HKRQ, tt.FACT_END_DATE, CAST(tt.DQRQ AS DATE) AS DQRQ, tt.LOAN_BAL, tt.YZFLX, tt.GRANT_SETTLE_ACTNO, tt.JJQCYE, tt.BZNS_TYPE, tt.F_WBBH, tt.F_WBDM, tt.F_WBMC, tt.F_HL, tt.F_WBBJF, tt.F_GBSZM, tt.F_BZDW, tt.F_DYHSBH, tt.F_HSZZ, tt.KEYID, tt.VALUEZD, CASE WHEN tt.valuezd LIKE '%银团%' OR tt.valuezd LIKE '%自营%' THEN '1' WHEN tt.valuezd LIKE '%买方信贷%' THEN '2' WHEN tt.valuezd LIKE '%垫款%' THEN '3' ELSE '4' END AS ywlx, TT.YQJE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TRIM(tt.YQRQ), 'yyyy/mm/dd'), 'yyyy/mm/dd') AS YQRQ FROM tt LEFT JOIN dim_cydw_yjdw dd ON tt.ejdw = dd.YJDWMC

nodes.name: dim_cydw_yjdw
nodes.sql: SELECT * FROM dim_cydw_yjdw

nodes.name: BLK_3
nodes.sql: WITH tt AS (SELECT t.*, z.f_wbbh, z.f_wbdm, z.f_wbmc, TO_CHAR(z.f_hl) AS f_hl, z.f_wbbjf, z.f_gbszm, z.f_bzdw, z.f_dyhsbh, z.f_hszz, h.* FROM (SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code) AS DUE_BILL_CODE, BK.DUE_BILL_ID, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN JJ.LOAN_AMT / 10000 ELSE 0 END AS ffje, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END AS grant_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(jj.intrate, 4), '90.9999') AS intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(zq.ext_rate, 4), '90.9999') AS ext_rate, CASE bk.bzns_type WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN BK.BZNS_AMT ELSE 0 END / 10000 AS hkje, CASE bk.bzns_type WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN BK.BZNS_DATE ELSE '' END AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, (CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN KC.PJYFKC_DQRQ ELSE JJ.FACT_END_DATE END) ELSE zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END) AS dqrq, ((COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook BOOK WHERE BOOK.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND BOOK.BZNS_DATE > '20241231' AND (BOOK.REVER_STAT = '0' OR BOOK.REVER_STAT IS NULL) AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook BOOK WHERE BOOK.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BOOK.REVER_DATE > BOOK.BZNS_DATE AND BOOK.BZNS_DATE <= '20241231' AND BOOK.REVER_DATE > '20241231' AND BOOK.REVER_TYPE = '2' AND BOOK.REVER_STAT = '2' AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02'), 0) * (-1))) / 10000 AS LOAN_BAL, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') / 10000 AS yzflx, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN PJYFKC_CPRXHH ELSE COALESCE((SELECT MAX(cust_settle_actno) FROM lc00059999.corp_loan_repay_apply clra WHERE clra.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_amt = clra.repay_amt), JJ.RECV_ACTNO) END) AS grant_settle_actno, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date < '20240101' THEN jj.loan_amt / 10000 ELSE 0 END - (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(s.bzns_amt) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook s WHERE s.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND s.bzns_date < '20240101' AND s.bzns_type = 'DGXD02' AND s.rever_type IS NULL), 0)) / 10000 AS jjqcye, bk.bzns_type, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND (CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END) <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND (CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END) <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_due_bill jj ON bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND jj.cust_loan_kind IN ('LN_ZY', 'LN_SDL', 'ICF_FL', 'ICF_BLN', 'LN_OTH') LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_cont_base ht ON jj.cont_id = ht.cont_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.cust_corp_info cc ON bk.cust_code = cc.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON bk.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.due_bill_id = bk.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_type IN ('DGXD01', 'DGXD02', 'DGXD48') AND (NOT COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') AND bk.rever_stat <> '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') = '2' AND bk.rever_stat = '2' AND BK.BZNS_DATE = '20241231')) AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND (cc.cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (ht.cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND bk.bzns_date >= '20210101' AND (zq.apply_date = (SELECT MAX(apply_date) FROM lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term z WHERE z.due_bill_id = bk.due_bill_id) OR zq.apply_date IS NULL) UNION ALL SELECT ejdw, cust_code, cust_name, cont_code, ext_cont_no, cust_loan_subtype, totamt, curcd, DUE_BILL_CODE, DUE_BILL_ID, jjje, ffje, '' AS grant_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(intrate, 4), '90.9999'), zqje, old_cont_end_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(ext_rate, 4), '90.9999'), hkje, hkrq, FACT_END_DATE, dqrq, jjqcye AS LOAN_BAL, yzflx, grant_settle_actno, jjqcye, '期初' AS bzns_type, YQJE, YQRQ FROM (SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, CASE ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND WHEN 'LN_ZY' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_SDL' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_OTH' THEN '垫款' WHEN 'ICF_BLN' THEN '买方信贷' WHEN 'ICF_FL' THEN '保理' END AS CUST_LOAN_KIND, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, jj.due_bill_code, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, (CASE WHEN jj.GRANT_DATE >= '20240101' THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND S.BZNS_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND S.REVER_TYPE IS NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND s.BZNS_DATE < '20240101' AND s.REVER_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND s.REVER_STAT = '2' AND s.REVER_TYPE = '2'), 0) + COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0), jj.LOAN_AMT) END) / 10000 AS jjqcye, 0 AS ffje, jj.GRANT_DATE, jj.intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, zq.ext_rate, 0 AS hkje, '' AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN jj.FACT_END_DATE WHEN NOT zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END AS dqrq, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) / 10000 AS yzflx, jj.recv_actno AS grant_settle_actno, jj.due_bill_id, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_CONT_BASE ht INNER JOIN lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_DUE_BILL jj ON ht.CONT_ID = jj.CONT_ID INNER JOIN lc00059999.CUST_CORP_INFO cc ON cc.CUST_CODE = ht.CUST_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON ht.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.BILL_STAT IN ('2', '4', '5') AND ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND <> 'LN_WD') WHERE (jjqcye <> 0 OR yzflx <> 0) AND GRANT_DATE < '20240101' AND (cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND NOT due_bill_id IN (SELECT due_bill_id FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.bzns_type = 'DGXD02' AND COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') <> '1' AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) t LEFT JOIN lc00059999.LSWBZD z ON t.curcd = z.F_WBBH LEFT JOIN (SELECT pd.id AS keyid, (SELECT type_name || '-' || pd.type_name FROM lc00059999.prd_business_type pe WHERE pe.id = pd.super_id) AS valuezd FROM lc00059999.prd_business_type pd WHERE pd.super_id IN ('LN_ZY', 'LN_SDL', 'ICF_FL', 'ICF_BLN', 'LN_OTH')) h ON t.cust_loan_subtype = h.keyid), t1 AS (SELECT tt.EJDW, tt.CUST_CODE, tt.CUST_NAME, tt.CONT_CODE, tt.EXT_CONT_NO, tt.CUST_LOAN_SUBTYPE, TO_CHAR(ROUND(tt.TOTAMT / 10000, 2), '999999999990.99') AS totamt, tt.CURCD, tt.DUE_BILL_CODE, TT.DUE_BILL_ID, tt.JJJE, tt.FFJE, CAST(tt.GRANT_DATE AS DATE) AS GRANT_DATE, tt.INTRATE, tt.ZQJE, CAST(tt.OLD_CONT_END_DATE AS DATE) AS OLD_CONT_END_DATE, tt.EXT_RATE, tt.HKJE, CAST(tt.HKRQ AS DATE) AS HKRQ, tt.FACT_END_DATE, CAST(tt.DQRQ AS DATE) AS DQRQ, tt.LOAN_BAL, tt.YZFLX, tt.GRANT_SETTLE_ACTNO, tt.JJQCYE, tt.BZNS_TYPE, tt.F_WBBH, tt.F_WBDM, tt.F_WBMC, tt.F_HL, tt.F_WBBJF, tt.F_GBSZM, tt.F_BZDW, tt.F_DYHSBH, tt.F_HSZZ, tt.KEYID, tt.VALUEZD, CASE WHEN tt.valuezd LIKE '%银团%' OR tt.valuezd LIKE '%自营%' THEN '1' WHEN tt.valuezd LIKE '%买方信贷%' THEN '2' WHEN tt.valuezd LIKE '%垫款%' THEN '3' ELSE '4' END AS ywlx, TT.YQJE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TRIM(tt.YQRQ), 'yyyy/mm/dd'), 'yyyy/mm/dd') AS YQRQ FROM tt LEFT JOIN dim_cydw_yjdw dd ON tt.ejdw = dd.YJDWMC) SELECT * FROM (SELECT t1.* FROM t1 JOIN (SELECT due_bill_code, SUM(hkje) AS hkje FROM t1 GROUP BY due_bill_code) temp ON t1.due_bill_code = temp.due_bill_code WHERE (NOT BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD01', 'DGXD48') OR (BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD01', 'DGXD48') AND temp.hkje = 0)) UNION ALL SELECT '合计' AS EJDW, 'hj001' AS CUST_CODE, ' ' AS CUST_NAME, ' ' AS CONT_CODE, ' ' AS EXT_CONT_NO, ' ' AS CUST_LOAN_SUBTYPE, TO_CHAR((SELECT SUM(totamt) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT cont_code, totamt FROM t1 WHERE t1.YWLX = '' OR '' IS NULL)), '999999999990.99') AS totamt, ' ' AS CURCD, ' ' AS DUE_BILL_CODE, ' ' AS DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT SUM(jjje) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT due_bill_code, jjje FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)) AS jjje, (SELECT SUM(ffje) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT DUE_BILL_ID, ffje FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)) AS ffje, ' ' AS GRANT_DATE, ' ' AS INTRATE, (SELECT SUM(zqje) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT EXT_CONT_NO, zqje FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)) AS ZQJE, ' ' AS OLD_CONT_END_DATE, ' ' AS EXT_RATE, (SELECT SUM(hkje) FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL) AS hkje, ' ' AS HKRQ, ' ' AS FACT_END_DATE, ' ' AS DQRQ, (SELECT SUM(loan_bal) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT due_bill_code, loan_bal FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)) AS loan_bal, (SELECT SUM(yzflx) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT due_bill_code, yzflx FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)) AS yzflx, ' ' AS GRANT_SETTLE_ACTNO, (SELECT SUM(jjqcye) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT due_bill_code, jjqcye FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)) AS jjqcye, ' ' AS BZNS_TYPE, ' ' AS F_WBBH, ' ' AS F_WBDM, ' ' AS F_WBMC, ' ' AS F_HL, ' ' AS F_WBBJF, ' ' AS F_GBSZM, ' ' AS F_BZDW, ' ' AS F_DYHSBH, ' ' AS F_HSZZ, ' ' AS KEYID, ' ' AS VALUEZD, '0' AS YWLX, (SELECT SUM(YQJE) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT due_bill_code, YQJE FROM t1 WHERE t1.ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)) AS YQJE, ' ' AS YQRQ FROM (SELECT 1 AS dummy)) WHERE (ywlx = '0' OR ywlx = '' OR '' IS NULL)

nodes.sql: SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code) AS DUE_BILL_CODE, BK.DUE_BILL_ID, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN JJ.LOAN_AMT / 10000 ELSE 0 END AS ffje, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END AS grant_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(jj.intrate, 4), '90.9999') AS intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(zq.ext_rate, 4), '90.9999') AS ext_rate, CASE bk.bzns_type WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN BK.BZNS_AMT ELSE 0 END / 10000 AS hkje, CASE bk.bzns_type WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN BK.BZNS_DATE ELSE '' END AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, (CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN KC.PJYFKC_DQRQ ELSE JJ.FACT_END_DATE END) ELSE zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END) AS dqrq, ((COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook BOOK WHERE BOOK.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND BOOK.BZNS_DATE > '20241231' AND (BOOK.REVER_STAT = '0' OR BOOK.REVER_STAT IS NULL) AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook BOOK WHERE BOOK.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BOOK.REVER_DATE > BOOK.BZNS_DATE AND BOOK.BZNS_DATE <= '20241231' AND BOOK.REVER_DATE > '20241231' AND BOOK.REVER_TYPE = '2' AND BOOK.REVER_STAT = '2' AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02'), 0) * (-1))) / 10000 AS LOAN_BAL, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') / 10000 AS yzflx, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN PJYFKC_CPRXHH ELSE COALESCE((SELECT MAX(cust_settle_actno) FROM lc00059999.corp_loan_repay_apply clra WHERE clra.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_amt = clra.repay_amt), JJ.RECV_ACTNO) END) AS grant_settle_actno, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date < '20240101' THEN jj.loan_amt / 10000 ELSE 0 END - (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(s.bzns_amt) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook s WHERE s.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND s.bzns_date < '20240101' AND s.bzns_type = 'DGXD02' AND s.rever_type IS NULL), 0)) / 10000 AS jjqcye, bk.bzns_type, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND (CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END) <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND (CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END) <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_due_bill jj ON bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND jj.cust_loan_kind IN ('LN_ZY', 'LN_SDL', 'ICF_FL', 'ICF_BLN', 'LN_OTH') LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_cont_base ht ON jj.cont_id = ht.cont_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.cust_corp_info cc ON bk.cust_code = cc.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON bk.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.due_bill_id = bk.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_type IN ('DGXD01', 'DGXD02', 'DGXD48') AND (NOT COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') AND bk.rever_stat <> '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') = '2' AND bk.rever_stat = '2' AND BK.BZNS_DATE = '20241231')) AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND (cc.cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (ht.cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND bk.bzns_date >= '20210101' AND (zq.apply_date = (SELECT MAX(apply_date) FROM lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term z WHERE z.due_bill_id = bk.due_bill_id) OR zq.apply_date IS NULL) UNION ALL SELECT ejdw, cust_code, cust_name, cont_code, ext_cont_no, cust_loan_subtype, totamt, curcd, DUE_BILL_CODE, DUE_BILL_ID, jjje, ffje, '' AS grant_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(intrate, 4), '90.9999'), zqje, old_cont_end_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(ext_rate, 4), '90.9999'), hkje, hkrq, FACT_END_DATE, dqrq, jjqcye AS LOAN_BAL, yzflx, grant_settle_actno, jjqcye, '期初' AS bzns_type, YQJE, YQRQ FROM (SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, CASE ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND WHEN 'LN_ZY' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_SDL' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_OTH' THEN '垫款' WHEN 'ICF_BLN' THEN '买方信贷' WHEN 'ICF_FL' THEN '保理' END AS CUST_LOAN_KIND, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, jj.due_bill_code, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, (CASE WHEN jj.GRANT_DATE >= '20240101' THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND S.BZNS_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND S.REVER_TYPE IS NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND s.BZNS_DATE < '20240101' AND s.REVER_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND s.REVER_STAT = '2' AND s.REVER_TYPE = '2'), 0) + COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0), jj.LOAN_AMT) END) / 10000 AS jjqcye, 0 AS ffje, jj.GRANT_DATE, jj.intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, zq.ext_rate, 0 AS hkje, '' AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN jj.FACT_END_DATE WHEN NOT zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END AS dqrq, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) / 10000 AS yzflx, jj.recv_actno AS grant_settle_actno, jj.due_bill_id, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_CONT_BASE ht INNER JOIN lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_DUE_BILL jj ON ht.CONT_ID = jj.CONT_ID INNER JOIN lc00059999.CUST_CORP_INFO cc ON cc.CUST_CODE = ht.CUST_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON ht.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.BILL_STAT IN ('2', '4', '5') AND ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND <> 'LN_WD') WHERE (jjqcye <> 0 OR yzflx <> 0) AND GRANT_DATE < '20240101' AND (cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND NOT due_bill_id IN (SELECT due_bill_id FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.bzns_type = 'DGXD02' AND COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') <> '1' AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')

nodes.name: UNION_3
nodes.sql: SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code) AS DUE_BILL_CODE, BK.DUE_BILL_ID, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN JJ.LOAN_AMT / 10000 ELSE 0 END AS ffje, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END AS grant_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(jj.intrate, 4), '90.9999') AS intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(zq.ext_rate, 4), '90.9999') AS ext_rate, CASE bk.bzns_type WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN BK.BZNS_AMT ELSE 0 END / 10000 AS hkje, CASE bk.bzns_type WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN BK.BZNS_DATE ELSE '' END AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, (CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN KC.PJYFKC_DQRQ ELSE JJ.FACT_END_DATE END) ELSE zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END) AS dqrq, ((COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook BOOK WHERE BOOK.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND BOOK.BZNS_DATE > '20241231' AND (BOOK.REVER_STAT = '0' OR BOOK.REVER_STAT IS NULL) AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook BOOK WHERE BOOK.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BOOK.REVER_DATE > BOOK.BZNS_DATE AND BOOK.BZNS_DATE <= '20241231' AND BOOK.REVER_DATE > '20241231' AND BOOK.REVER_TYPE = '2' AND BOOK.REVER_STAT = '2' AND BOOK.BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02'), 0) * (-1))) / 10000 AS LOAN_BAL, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') / 10000 AS yzflx, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN PJYFKC_CPRXHH ELSE COALESCE((SELECT MAX(cust_settle_actno) FROM lc00059999.corp_loan_repay_apply clra WHERE clra.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_amt = clra.repay_amt), JJ.RECV_ACTNO) END) AS grant_settle_actno, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date < '20240101' THEN jj.loan_amt / 10000 ELSE 0 END - (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(s.bzns_amt) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook s WHERE s.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND s.bzns_date < '20240101' AND s.bzns_type = 'DGXD02' AND s.rever_type IS NULL), 0)) / 10000 AS jjqcye, bk.bzns_type, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND (CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END) <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND (CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END) <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_due_bill jj ON bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND jj.cust_loan_kind IN ('LN_ZY', 'LN_SDL', 'ICF_FL', 'ICF_BLN', 'LN_OTH') LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_cont_base ht ON jj.cont_id = ht.cont_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.cust_corp_info cc ON bk.cust_code = cc.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON bk.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.due_bill_id = bk.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_type IN ('DGXD01', 'DGXD02', 'DGXD48') AND (NOT COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') AND bk.rever_stat <> '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') = '2' AND bk.rever_stat = '2' AND BK.BZNS_DATE = '20241231')) AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND (cc.cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (ht.cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND bk.bzns_date >= '20210101' AND (zq.apply_date = (SELECT MAX(apply_date) FROM lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term z WHERE z.due_bill_id = bk.due_bill_id) OR zq.apply_date IS NULL) UNION ALL SELECT ejdw, cust_code, cust_name, cont_code, ext_cont_no, cust_loan_subtype, totamt, curcd, DUE_BILL_CODE, DUE_BILL_ID, jjje, ffje, '' AS grant_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(intrate, 4), '90.9999'), zqje, old_cont_end_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(ext_rate, 4), '90.9999'), hkje, hkrq, FACT_END_DATE, dqrq, jjqcye AS LOAN_BAL, yzflx, grant_settle_actno, jjqcye, '期初' AS bzns_type, YQJE, YQRQ FROM (SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, CASE ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND WHEN 'LN_ZY' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_SDL' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_OTH' THEN '垫款' WHEN 'ICF_BLN' THEN '买方信贷' WHEN 'ICF_FL' THEN '保理' END AS CUST_LOAN_KIND, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, jj.due_bill_code, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, (CASE WHEN jj.GRANT_DATE >= '20240101' THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND S.BZNS_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND S.REVER_TYPE IS NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND s.BZNS_DATE < '20240101' AND s.REVER_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND s.REVER_STAT = '2' AND s.REVER_TYPE = '2'), 0) + COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0), jj.LOAN_AMT) END) / 10000 AS jjqcye, 0 AS ffje, jj.GRANT_DATE, jj.intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, zq.ext_rate, 0 AS hkje, '' AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN jj.FACT_END_DATE WHEN NOT zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END AS dqrq, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) / 10000 AS yzflx, jj.recv_actno AS grant_settle_actno, jj.due_bill_id, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_CONT_BASE ht INNER JOIN lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_DUE_BILL jj ON ht.CONT_ID = jj.CONT_ID INNER JOIN lc00059999.CUST_CORP_INFO cc ON cc.CUST_CODE = ht.CUST_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON ht.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.BILL_STAT IN ('2', '4', '5') AND ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND <> 'LN_WD') WHERE (jjqcye <> 0 OR yzflx <> 0) AND GRANT_DATE < '20240101' AND (cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND NOT due_bill_id IN (SELECT due_bill_id FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.bzns_type = 'DGXD02' AND COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') <> '1' AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')

(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') / 10000 AS yzflx, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN PJYFKC_CPRXHH ELSE COALESCE((SELECT MAX(cust_settle_actno) FROM lc00059999.corp_loan_repay_apply clra WHERE clra.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_amt = clra.repay_amt), JJ.RECV_ACTNO) END) AS grant_settle_actno, CASE WHEN jj.grant_date < '20240101' THEN ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND (CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END) <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_due_bill jj ON bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND jj.cust_loan_kind IN ('LN_ZY', 'LN_SDL', 'ICF_FL', 'ICF_BLN', 'LN_OTH') LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_cont_base ht ON jj.cont_id = ht.cont_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.cust_corp_info cc ON bk.cust_code = cc.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON bk.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = BK.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.due_bill_id = bk.due_bill_id AND bk.bzns_type IN ('DGXD01', 'DGXD02', 'DGXD48') AND (NOT COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') IN ('1', '2') AND bk.rever_stat <> '2') OR (COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') = '2' AND bk.rever_stat = '2' AND BK.BZNS_DATE = '20241231')) AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND (cc.cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (ht.cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND bk.bzns_date >= '20210101' AND nodes.sql: SELECT ejdw, cust_code, cust_name, cont_code, ext_cont_no, cust_loan_subtype, totamt, curcd, DUE_BILL_CODE, DUE_BILL_ID, jjje, ffje, '' AS grant_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(intrate, 4), '90.9999'), zqje, old_cont_end_date, TO_CHAR(ROUND(ext_rate, 4), '90.9999'), hkje, hkrq, FACT_END_DATE, dqrq, jjqcye AS LOAN_BAL, yzflx, grant_settle_actno, jjqcye, '期初' AS bzns_type, YQJE, YQRQ FROM (SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, CASE ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND WHEN 'LN_ZY' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_SDL' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_OTH' THEN '垫款' WHEN 'ICF_BLN' THEN '买方信贷' WHEN 'ICF_FL' THEN '保理' END AS CUST_LOAN_KIND, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, jj.due_bill_code, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, (CASE WHEN jj.GRANT_DATE >= '20240101' THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND S.BZNS_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND S.REVER_TYPE IS NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND s.BZNS_DATE < '20240101' AND s.REVER_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND s.REVER_STAT = '2' AND s.REVER_TYPE = '2'), 0) + COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0), jj.LOAN_AMT) END) / 10000 AS jjqcye, 0 AS ffje, jj.GRANT_DATE, jj.intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, zq.ext_rate, 0 AS hkje, '' AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN jj.FACT_END_DATE WHEN NOT zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END AS dqrq, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) / 10000 AS yzflx, jj.recv_actno AS grant_settle_actno, jj.due_bill_id, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_CONT_BASE ht INNER JOIN lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_DUE_BILL jj ON ht.CONT_ID = jj.CONT_ID INNER JOIN lc00059999.CUST_CORP_INFO cc ON cc.CUST_CODE = ht.CUST_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON ht.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.BILL_STAT IN ('2', '4', '5') AND ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND <> 'LN_WD') WHERE (jjqcye <> 0 OR yzflx <> 0) AND GRANT_DATE < '20240101' AND (cust_name LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND (cont_code LIKE '%%' OR '' IS NULL) AND NOT due_bill_id IN (SELECT due_bill_id FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.bzns_type = 'DGXD02' AND COALESCE(bk.rever_type, '99') <> '1' AND bk.bzns_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')

cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, CASE ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND WHEN 'LN_ZY' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_SDL' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_OTH' THEN '垫款' WHEN 'ICF_BLN' THEN '买方信贷' WHEN 'ICF_FL' THEN '保理' END AS CUST_LOAN_KIND, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, jj.due_bill_code, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, (CASE WHEN jj.GRANT_DATE >= '20240101' THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND S.BZNS_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND S.REVER_TYPE IS NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND s.BZNS_DATE < '20240101' AND s.REVER_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND s.REVER_STAT = '2' AND s.REVER_TYPE = '2'), 0) + COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0), jj.LOAN_AMT) END) / 10000 AS jjqcye, 0 AS ffje, jj.GRANT_DATE, jj.intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, zq.ext_rate, 0 AS hkje, '' AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN jj.FACT_END_DATE WHEN NOT zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END AS dqrq, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) / 10000 AS yzflx, jj.recv_actno AS grant_settle_actno, jj.due_bill_id, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_CONT_BASE ht INNER JOIN lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_DUE_BILL jj ON ht.CONT_ID = jj.CONT_ID INNER JOIN lc00059999.CUST_CORP_INFO cc ON cc.CUST_CODE = ht.CUST_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON ht.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN nodes.sql: SELECT c.ejdw, cc.cust_code, cc.cust_name, CASE WHEN jj.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.CONT_CODE FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), COALESCE(kc.pjyfkc_pjbh, jj.due_bill_code)) ELSE ht.cont_code END AS cont_code, COALESCE(zq.ext_cont_no, ' ') AS ext_cont_no, CASE ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND WHEN 'LN_ZY' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_SDL' THEN '自营' WHEN 'LN_OTH' THEN '垫款' WHEN 'ICF_BLN' THEN '买方信贷' WHEN 'ICF_FL' THEN '保理' END AS CUST_LOAN_KIND, jj.cust_loan_subtype, CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' THEN COALESCE((SELECT BL.amount FROM lc00059999.BL_BILL_CONT BL, lc00059999.PJKPZB Z, lc00059999.PJYFKC P WHERE BL.CONT_ID = Z.ACCEPTANCE_CONT AND Z.PJKPZB_NM = P.PJYFKC_KPZBNM AND P.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE), PJYFKC_PMJE) ELSE ht.totamt END AS totamt, jj.curcd, jj.due_bill_code, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype IN ('PJDK_LN', 'LN_OTH000222') THEN PJYFKC_PMJE ELSE jj.loan_amt END) / 10000 AS jjje, (CASE WHEN jj.GRANT_DATE >= '20240101' THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND S.BZNS_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND S.REVER_TYPE IS NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(S.BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook S WHERE S.DUE_BILL_ID = jj.DUE_BILL_ID AND s.BZNS_DATE < '20240101' AND s.REVER_DATE >= '20240101' AND S.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD11') AND s.REVER_STAT = '2' AND s.REVER_TYPE = '2'), 0) + COALESCE(jj.LOAN_BAL, 0), jj.LOAN_AMT) END) / 10000 AS jjqcye, 0 AS ffje, jj.GRANT_DATE, jj.intrate, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN (CASE WHEN zq.loan_bal = 0 THEN zq.loan_amt ELSE zq.loan_bal END) / 10000 ELSE NULL END AS zqje, CASE WHEN zq.old_cont_end_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN zq.old_cont_end_date ELSE '' END AS old_cont_end_date, zq.ext_rate, 0 AS hkje, '' AS hkrq, JJ.FACT_END_DATE, CASE WHEN zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN jj.FACT_END_DATE WHEN NOT zq.ext_cont_no IS NULL THEN zq.NEW_CONT_END_DATE END AS dqrq, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bk.bzns_amt), 0) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook bk WHERE bk.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id AND BK.BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD13', 'DGXD27', 'DGXD28', 'DGXD30') AND REVER_TYPE IS NULL AND bk.BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231')) / 10000 AS yzflx, jj.recv_actno AS grant_settle_actno, jj.due_bill_id, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN ((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD48' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231') - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(BZNS_AMT) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD02' AND BZNS_DATE <= '20241231'), 0)) / 10000 ELSE STD.BZNS_AMT / 10000 END) AS YQJE, (CASE WHEN ht.cust_loan_subtype = 'PJDK_LN' AND jj.GRANT_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(BZNS_DATE) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02')) AND (SELECT SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS JE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook STD WHERE STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD48', 'DGXD02') AND BZNS_DATE = jj.grant_date) <> 0 THEN CASE WHEN jj.grant_date BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' THEN jj.grant_date ELSE '' END ELSE STD.BZNS_DATE END) AS YQRQ FROM lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_CONT_BASE ht INNER JOIN lc00059999.CORP_LOAN_DUE_BILL jj ON ht.CONT_ID = jj.CONT_ID INNER JOIN lc00059999.CUST_CORP_INFO cc ON cc.CUST_CODE = ht.CUST_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.yjdw AS ejdw, cust_code FROM lc00019999.dwd_cust_corp_info_his b WHERE b.start_date <= GREATEST('20241231', '20220101') AND b.end_date > GREATEST('20241231', '20220101')) c ON ht.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN lc00059999.corp_loan_extend_term zq ON zq.due_bill_id = jj.due_bill_id LEFT JOIN lc00059999.PJYFKC KC ON KC.PJYFKC_NM = ht.PRE_BSNS_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT BZNS_DATE FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE BZNS_TYPE = 'DGXD03' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) AS BZNS_DATE, SUM(CASE BZNS_TYPE WHEN 'DGXD02' THEN -BZNS_AMT ELSE BZNS_AMT END) AS BZNS_AMT FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook A WHERE DUE_BILL_ID IN (SELECT DUE_BILL_ID FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231') AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND BZNS_TYPE IN ('DGXD02', 'DGXD03') AND STDBOOK_SN >= (SELECT MIN(STDBOOK_SN) FROM dw_xd_corp_loan_stdbook WHERE REMARK LIKE '%转逾期%' AND BZNS_DATE BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20241231' AND DUE_BILL_ID = A.DUE_BILL_ID) GROUP BY DUE_BILL_ID) STD ON STD.DUE_BILL_ID = JJ.DUE_BILL_ID WHERE jj.BILL_STAT IN ('2', '4', '5') AND ht.CUST_LOAN_KIND <> 'LN_WD'
